title: System Maintenance
message: Scheduled maintenance on the Voter ID lookup database tonight at 2:00 AM IST.

title: New Constituencies Added
message: 3 new mock constituencies have been added to the West Bengal electoral roll.

title: Translation Complete
message: Bengali translation for Phase 2 components has reached 100% coverage.

title: API Gateway Timeout
message: We experienced a 5-minute outage in the SMS gateway integration.

title: Elections Schedule Update
message: The ECI has revised Phase 4 dates. Please review the updated timeline.
